violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Both of the soda dispensers need to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the stand up coolers/freezer need to be cleaned. Inside of both the microwaves in the kitchen need to be cleaned. Inside of the whip cream cooler needs to be cleaned. The trays in the walk-in cooler need to be changed out and cleaned everyday.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walk-in cooler floors under the racking needs to be cleaned.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Reach-in prep cooler was not keeping food at temperatures below 41 degrees, products were temping at 45-50 degrees.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
